title: Wow. You All Are Fast.
excerpt: So the travel kits sold out within a matter of minutes. Thank you! I promise to work on getting more in over the next couple of weeks. There will be variations on the upcoming kits since they will all be…
body:
So the travel kits sold out within a matter of minutes. Thank you!
I promise to work on getting more in over the next couple of weeks. There will be variations on the upcoming kits since they will all be in limited quantities. And if you were promised a kit in my Big Picture Class and weren't one of the lucky ones this morning, email me please - hello(at)amytangerine(dot)com. We will take pre-payments for the next batch.

Back from Pittsburgh where I had a wonderful time teaching and just relaxing. Will post photos soon. I definitely am thinking about becoming a germaphobe, considering on my flights there, plenty of people were coughing and sneezing around me. And then on the way home I became one of those people. So I am nursing a cold and trying to get better quickly. I slept for over 9 hours in my own bed. Today I'll head to mommy's so she can take good care of me and fill me up with healthy liquids like her signature lemon and honey concoction and chicken soup.
